risk: Ecommerce projects expand when variants, shipping rules, tax handling, refunds, and admin workflows are not clarified.
recommended_question: Do products need variants, shipping zones, tax rules, refunds, or custom admin workflows?

risk: Calendar sync, reminders, rescheduling, and staff availability can expand a simple booking feature.
recommended_question: Do appointments need calendar sync, reminders, payment, or rescheduling?

risk: SaaS tools expand when roles, permissions, admin controls, billing, team accounts, audit logs, integrations, and deployment support are treated as included by default.
recommended_question: Which roles, admin functions, billing needs, integrations, and launch workflows are required for v1?

risk: Parser and AI extraction tools depend on document variety, OCR quality, extraction fields, CSV/export rules, validation states, privacy constraints, and human review workflows.
recommended_question: What document types, extraction fields, accuracy target, review workflow, and export formats are required for v1?

risk: Mobile apps that need login, sync, or shared data require backend scope.
recommended_question: Does the app need user accounts, cloud sync, or backend dashboards?

risk: Push notifications require platform setup, permission handling, and testing.
recommended_question: Are notifications local reminders or server-triggered push notifications?

risk: Social media apps can balloon when stories, filters, recommendations, moderation, chat, livestreaming, and media processing are treated as one MVP.
recommended_question: Which social features are required for v1, and which can move to phase two?

risk: Mobile game projects expand quickly when custom art, animation, 3D, multiplayer, economy, live ops, backend leaderboards, ads, in-app purchases, and app-store compliance are treated as one MVP.
recommended_question: What game engine, platform target, art/audio readiness, content count, monetization features, and multiplayer requirements are included in v1?

risk: UI/UX projects expand when screen count, states, and responsive variants are vague.
recommended_question: How many final screens, states, and responsive variants are included?

risk: Research depth and subject expertise can change effort significantly.
recommended_question: Will you provide keywords/source material, or should research be included?

risk: Data cleanup and KPI definition often take longer than dashboard visuals.
recommended_question: Are the data sources clean and are KPI formulas already defined?

risk: Urgent timelines may require rush pricing or reduced scope.
recommended_question: Which features are essential for launch and which can move to phase two?

risk: Missing copy, brand assets, and photos can delay delivery.
recommended_question: Are copy, images, branding, and product content ready before development starts?
